Defines notification preference database keys and a color constant for SMS replies.

# Purpose
This C header file defines constants related to notification preferences and color settings for a Pebble application. It includes a header file `gtypes.h` from the `applib/graphics` directory, which suggests that it uses graphical types defined elsewhere. The file defines `SMS_REPLY_COLOR` as `GColorIslamicGreen`, which is likely a color used for SMS reply notifications. It also defines string constants for notification preference database keys, such as `SEND_TEXT_NOTIF_PREF_KEY`, `ANDROID_PHONE_KEY`, and `IOS_PHONE_KEY`, which are used to identify preferences related to sending text notifications and handling incoming call replies on Android and iOS devices.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/graphics/gtypes.h`
